package rulecoverage

func NegativeUpdatesMapAllocatedPerRow() string {
    ruleID := "updates_map_allocated_per_row"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "GORM Updates(map[string]...) maps allocated inside loops for per-row updates."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
